productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Grey Tops
description: Composition Purple grey and white check top with green accents, made of 100% cotton, with a shawl collar, buttoned chest placket, short Sleeve with ruched hems and has a ruched hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery With comfort and style rolled into one, this checked top from united colors of benetton is designed for those who love a free flowing and comfortable top. The rouching at the sleeve hems redefines your rounded arms, while the rouching at the hemline sits snug on your waist, offering a complete comfort Fit on the torso. The shawl collar gives this top a complete feminine touch. Team this with slim fit jeans or white skirts and brown sandals for that chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
